title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, discusses Anthropic's frontier models Fable and Mythos being pulled from market following government action. Krieger describes how AI-native product development changes engineering workflows and defends Anthropic's safety positioning as substantive rather than marketing. The interview covers Anthropic's dual role as both platform and product competitor.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, about the company's frontier models Fable and Mythos, which were pulled from market following government action. Krieger explains how AI-native product development reshapes engineering workflows and argues that Anthropic's safety positioning is substantive rather than marketing. The conversation also addresses Anthropic's dual role as both a platform other companies build on and a product competitor.
